title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 4 - Sensing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu covers AI fundamentals including sensing. The course is offered through Harvard's extension and summer schools, edX, and OpenCourseWare with open access and community engagement across multiple platforms.
writeup: This CS50 chapter, taught by Brian Yu, covers sensing within an introduction to artificial intelligence, touching on computer vision as part of the course's AI fundamentals. It is presented as a live, unedited session. The broader course is distributed through Harvard's extension and summer schools, edX, and OpenCourseWare, with open access and community engagement across multiple platforms.
